title: Fermented Saudic Bean Stir-fry
description: A dense and fermented plant-based dish from Saudi Arabia featuring ground cardamom in a light stir-fry that is perfect for any meal.
instructions: Prepare the fermented lentils by rinsing them thoroughly under cold water.
In a large pan, heat the vegetable oil over medium-high heat. Add the chopped onion and minced garlic, sauté until golden brown.
Add the sliced bell pepper to the pan and continue cooking for another 2-3 minutes or until softened slightly.
Stir in the ground cardamom, cumin, and salt. Cook for about a minute to release flavors.
Pour in the fermented lentils and soy sauce, stir well to coat all ingredients evenly.
Cook for an additional 5-7 minutes or until everything is heated through and the lentils are tender but not mushy.
Serve hot as a side dish with any main meal.
